refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall minimize cycle time for each phase of the load→travel→dump cycle to meet the customer-defined target.
refined_fr.rationale: Decomposing the overall cycle time KPI into sub-functions for each phase allows targeted design parameters and clearer verification of performance improvements.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure p95 cycle time for load, travel, and dump phases separately under representative duty cycles and site conditions.
sub_frs: FR1: Minimize load phase cycle time
FR2: Minimize travel phase cycle time
FR3: Minimize dump phase cycle time

candidate_dps: DP1: Optimize vehicle mechanical and control systems for load phase efficiency
DP2: Optimize vehicle navigation and propulsion for travel phase efficiency
DP3: Optimize vehicle dumping mechanism and control for dump phase efficiency
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1, DP2, DP3 combined to address each sub-FR distinctly

potential_sources: Interdependencies between vehicle control algorithms across phases
coupling_check.notes: DPs are logically decoupled by phase but share vehicle platform; careful interface design needed to avoid cross-phase interference.

assumptions_risks: Assumes vehicle platform can be modularly controlled per phase
Risk of performance degradation if phase optimizations conflict
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Monitor phase interaction effects during integration testing; consider modular control software architecture.

im_boundary.name: Vehicle
im_boundary.scope: Physical and control systems responsible for load, travel, and dump phases

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Vehicle sends cycle time and status data to NGHE Solution

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receives commands for cycle phase transitions and operational parameters

external_interfaces.name: SafetyAlert
external_interfaces.details: Sends safety-related alerts to Safety Services

module_containment_scores.notes: Vehicle module fully contains physical and control aspects of cycle phases; low diffusion risk.
NGHE Solution oversees overall coordination but does not directly implement cycle phase controls.
Teleoperation module interfaces for remote control but does not contain cycle phase logic.
Safety Services receives alerts but does not implement cycle time functions.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Assigning cycle time optimization DPs to Vehicle module centralizes control and physical actuation, minimizing diffusion and interface complexity.
containment_risks: Potential overloading of Vehicle module with complex control logic
Interface coordination with NGHE Solution and Safety Services must be robust
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Evaluate control software modularity within Vehicle to manage complexity; define clear interface contracts.

fr_dp_gate.reason: FRs are clearly decomposed and matched with logically distinct DPs addressing each sub-function.

diffusion_risks: Possible complexity in Vehicle control software if all DPs are tightly integrated
Need to ensure interfaces with NGHE Solution and Safety Services are well defined
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Vehicle module shows high containment score and low diffusion, supporting good architectural packaging.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by measuring cycle times via Telemetry interface and validating phase transitions via Tasking commands.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear ownership of cycle time functions within Vehicle module with well-defined external interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Refine Vehicle control software modularity to reduce complexity
Strengthen interface definitions with NGHE Solution and Safety Services

decision.justification: Functional decomposition, DP selection, and IM assignment are consistent, with manageable risks and clear verification paths. No immediate need to revise or zigzag.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Minimize load phase cycle time
FR2: Minimize travel phase cycle time
FR3: Minimize dump phase cycle time

revise.why: Current level decomposition and assignments are sound; proceed to next level refinement.

assumptions: Vehicle platform supports modular control per cycle phase
Interfaces with NGHE Solution and Safety Services are stable and well-defined
open_risks: Control software complexity within Vehicle module
Phase interaction effects impacting cycle time performance
evidence_needed: Integration test results showing phase-specific cycle time improvements
Interface compliance verification between Vehicle, NGHE Solution, and Safety Services
